commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows Apple app-specific-password redaction by removing most generic field gates, adding nearby Apple/iCloud/app-password context checks for generic strings, and adding redaction regression tests.

PR surface: Source +36, Tests +74. Total +110 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main unconditionally app-password-scans broad generic structured fields, and the transcript/audit paths persist shared redactor output; this read-only review did not run tests.
